title: Paragon on Hyperliquid: Trade Bitcoin Dominance
summary_title: Paragon launches Bitcoin dominance and crypto indices on Hyperliquid
summary_description: Founder Taha explains how Paragon makes previously untradeable Bitcoin dominance and market indices actionable through HIP3 perpetual futures.

key_moments.label: Introduction to Paragon, a new HIP3 deployer on Hyperliquid
Taha's background from tradfi to DeFi to product-focused building
Concept behind Paragon: making Bitcoin dominance and indices tradeable
Why Bitcoin dominance hasn't been tradeable before despite being widely charted
Three live tickers: BTCD (Bitcoin dominance), Total2, and Others index
Data tables showing indices stability during market crashes versus single assets
Future pipeline and stablecoin dominance; community suggestions for new assets
How to access Paragon: TradFi campaign, multiple frontends, and community channels
